name: Investeringsforeningen Sparinvest - Globale Fokusaktier Kl
summary: Investeringsforeningen Sparinvest - Globale Fokusaktier Kl is an investment fund that focuses on global equities with a concentrated portfolio of selected stocks. The fund aims to achieve long-term capital appreciation through investments in a limited number of global companies. The fund is managed by Sparinvest and is domiciled in Denmark.
